title: Livestock animal isodata schema
description: Animal-specific parameters used to estimate livestock pathogen emissions.

fields.name: iso
fields.title: Animal isoraster zone identifier
fields.description: Integer identifier that maps rows to livestock animal isoraster values.

fields.name: frac_young
fields.title: Fraction young
fields.description: Fraction of young animals in the population.

fields.name: excr_young
fields.title: Excretion young
fields.description: Pathogen excretion per gram manure from young animals.

fields.name: excr_adult
fields.title: Excretion adult
fields.description: Pathogen excretion per gram manure from adult animals.

fields.name: excr_day
fields.title: Excretion per day
fields.description: Pathogen excretion per day, used for ducks and chickens.

fields.name: mass_young
fields.title: Young mass
fields.description: Body mass of a young animal (kg).

fields.name: mass_adult
fields.title: Adult mass
fields.description: Body mass of an adult animal (kg).

fields.name: manure_per_mass
fields.title: Manure per mass
fields.description: Yearly manure production per animal mass.
